faqs.question: Is transportation to the launch site included?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceWing includes round-trip transportation from major airports to our spaceports. We provide ground transportation, and for premium bookings, private jet service is available. International travelers receive assistance with flight bookings through our travel partners. All transportation during training and pre-flight activities is included.

faqs.question: Where will I stay during training?
faqs.answer: During training, you'll stay at the SpaceWing Astronaut Hotel located within our spaceport complexes. Standard bookings include private rooms with shared common areas. Premium bookings include luxury suites. All accommodations include: meals, fitness center access, spa services, and shuttle service to training facilities. Family members can book rooms at discounted rates.

faqs.question: Can family members accompany me?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Family members are welcome during your training period and launch. We offer Family Experience Packages that include: accommodation near the spaceport, launch viewing access, spaceport tours, educational activities, and a dedicated Family Coordinator. Many families make it a vacation, combining your space journey with their own adventures.

faqs.question: What should I pack for my space journey?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing provides a comprehensive packing list, but essentials include: comfortable casual clothing, workout attire, personal toiletries, any medications, camera/phone, and passport. We provide all mission-specific gear: flight suits, undergarments, personal items for use in space, and post-flight clothing. Leave space in your luggage for souvenirs!

faqs.question: Are meals included during training?
faqs.answer: Yes! All meals are included during your training and pre-flight period. Our dining facilities offer diverse menus accommodating dietary restrictions. You'll also experience space food tastings to prepare for in-flight meals. Special dietary needs should be communicated during booking so we can ensure appropriate options are available.

faqs.question: Can I extend my stay at the spaceport?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Many travelers and their families extend their stay to enjoy local attractions. Florida's Space Coast offers beaches, Kennedy Space Center visitor complex, and nature preserves. Mojave provides desert adventures, and Houston has excellent museums and dining. We partner with local hotels and tour operators for discounted extended stays.

faqs.question: What accommodations are available for families?
faqs.answer: Family members can stay at our partner hotels or the SpaceWing Astronaut Hotel (subject to availability). We offer family packages that include: multiple room bookings, family activities, launch viewing, and post-flight celebration arrangements. Our Family Concierge service helps coordinate logistics and activities for families of all sizes.

faqs.question: Is there a dress code?
faqs.answer: During training, comfortable casual attire is appropriate. Fitness clothing is needed for physical training sessions. Formal events (welcome dinner, graduation ceremony) call for business casual or cocktail attire. In space, you'll wear your SpaceWing flight suit. We recommend bringing layers as facilities can be cool.

faqs.question: Can I arrive early or stay late?
faqs.answer: Yes! Early arrival is welcomed and gives you time to acclimate, explore, and begin the pre-flight experience relaxed. Extended stays after your mission allow for post-flight celebrations and recovery. We can arrange additional nights at our facilities or partner hotels, and our concierge team can help plan extended itineraries.

faqs.question: What accessibility accommodations are available?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing facilities are fully accessible. We offer: accessible rooms and suites, wheelchair-accessible transportation, sign language interpreters, modified training protocols, accessible viewing areas for families, and specialized equipment. Our Accessibility Services team works with each traveler to ensure all accommodations meet their specific needs.
